metadata.methodology: Youth volunteering rate is the percentage of 16–25 year olds who report giving unpaid help through a group, club or organisation at least once in the past 12 months (formal volunteering), from the DCMS Community Life Survey. Regular volunteers are those volunteering monthly or more frequently.
knownIssues: The Community Life Survey methodology changed in 2018, creating a slight discontinuity — volunteer rates before and after 2018 may not be fully comparable.
2020 and 2021 pandemic years saw reduced formal volunteering but increased informal mutual aid not fully captured in formal survey data.
